117: Once upon a time in Hingashi, in the time they called the Age of Strife, there lived a man named Hanzo─Hanzo the First. Leader of the Kagekakushi clan, he crafted a summoning mudra of terrifying power.

Once upon a time in Hingashi, in the time they called the Age of Blood, there lived a man named Hanzo─Hanzo the First. Leader of the Kagekakushi clan, he crafted a summoning mudra of terrifying power.
